title: Gateway token mismatch fix
bullets: Resolved `unauthorized: gateway token mismatch` by updating `gateway.cmd` and the related env variables.
Next time a similar error appears, check token and env alignment first.

title: Telegram inline button rules
bullets: Inline keyboards use a single-row, 3-button layout.
Cancel button always sits on the rightmost slot.
reason: Two new rules belong to the same existing topic.

title: Sprint planning notes
bullets: Team agreed to focus on six items during sprint planning.
